title: justicia wardii
intro: Justicia wardii, also known as Ward's Justicia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant is primarily used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Justicia wardii include reducing fever, alleviating cough and respiratory issues, and promoting digestive health. The herbal preparations of Justicia wardii include tea, capsules, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
